page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 compute-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. This server features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core configuration. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 1.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or bundled GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data.

The hardware profile of the ecs.c2.medium is designed for compute-intensive workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. Because each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, the instance avoids resource contention issues common in multi-threaded environments. This architecture is qualitatively cost-efficient for tasks that demand high raw processing power but have minimal memory footprints, as users do not pay for excess RAM capacity.

Appropriate workloads for this instance type include CPU-bound batch processing, parallel computing tasks, high-performance web servers, and lightweight CI/CD build nodes. The lack of local storage and the low memory-to-CPU ratio make it less suitable for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, or data-intensive analytics pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.medium is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance configured with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs on the KVM hypervisor. Operating with a single thread per core, this instance provides dedicated CPU allocation paired with 16.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a 1.0 GB per core ratio. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for CPU-bound applications that require consistent processing performance without the overhead of hyperthreading or large memory footprints. It is best suited for workloads such as batch processing, parallel computing, lightweight CI/CD pipelines, and dedicated web serving.

tagline: A compute-focused virtual server featuring dedicated physical cores and a balanced low-memory profile for highly parallelized CPU-bound workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing 1.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor architecture on the x86_64 platform
No local storage or integrated GPU accelerators included
